zh.lifeSummary: John Loudham II是John Loudham I的兒子，於1314年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾。他於1354年與Isabel Breton在英國諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年11月6日在英國德比夏爾沃爾頓享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Loudham II是John Loudham I的儿子，于1314年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾。他于1354年与Isabel Breton在英国諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年11月6日在英国德比夏爾沃爾頓享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: John Loudham II was born in 1314, in Nottinghamshire, England as the son of John Loudham I. He married Isabel Breton in 1354, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 November 1387, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: John Loudham II est né en 1314, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de John Loudham I. Il a épousé Isabel Breton en 1354, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1387, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Loudham II wurde 1314 in Nottinghamshire, England, als Sohn von John Loudham I geboren. Er hat 1354 in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England Isabel Breton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1387 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Walton, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: John Loudham II è nato il nel 1314 nel Nottinghamshire, England come figlio di John Loudham I. Lui sposato Isabel Breton nel 1354, nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1387, nel Walton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Loudham IIは1314年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでJohn Loudham Iの息子として生まれた。1354年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムでIsabel Bretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年11月6日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Loudham II(은)는 1314년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 John Loudham I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1354년 영국 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 Isabel Breton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 11월 6일 영국 더비실르 월턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: Lowdham, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: John Loudham II nasceu em 1314, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de John Loudham I. Ele casou-se com Isabel Breton em 1354, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1387, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Loudham II родился в 1314 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. Его отца звали John Loudham I. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Breton в 1354 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1387 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Loudham II nació en 1314, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John Loudham I. Se casó con Isabel Breton en 1354, en Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1387, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
